steps.title: Use the area factors
steps.content:
For a rectangle,
$$
\text{area}=\text{width}\cdot\text{length}
$$
The given area is already written as the product $w(w+7)$.

steps.title: Identify the length factor
steps.content: The width is $w$, so the other factor, $w+7$, represents the length. The answer is D.
